channel.title: SPL - South Park Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - South Park Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help / Ayuda gratuita con los impuestos
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: South Park Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.Spanish support may be provided per request.----------------------------------------------------------------Voluntarios capacitados estarán disponibles para responder preguntas y preparar declaraciones de impuestos personales.Se puede proporcionar ayuda en español a pedido.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: South Park Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Preschool Story Time
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: South Park Branch

At storytime, kids ages 3-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: South Park Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods (DON) will be holding office hours as part of their "Meeting Community Where They Are At" Initiative.---------------------------------------------------------Sesiones con el Departamento de Vecindarios en la Sucursal de South ParkEl Departamento de Vecindarios (DON por sus siglas en inglés) de la ciudad de Seattle ofrecerá sesiones de atención al público como parte de su iniciativa "Conocer a la comunidad donde se encuentre".

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: South Park Branch, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / Caleidoscopio Juega y Aprende
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: South Park Branch, Children’s Area / Área para niños

Kaleidescope Play and LearnThis program will be conducted in English and Spanish. ------------------------------------------------------Caleidoscopio jugar y aprenderEste programa se realizará en español e Ingles. 

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: South Park Branch, Public Floor

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help / Ayuda gratuita con los impuestos
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: South Park Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.Spanish support may be provided per request.----------------------------------------------------------------Voluntarios capacitados estarán disponibles para responder preguntas y preparar declaraciones de impuestos personales.Se puede proporcionar ayuda en español a pedido.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: South Park Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.مارس لغتك الإنجليزية.دینک نیرمت ار دوخ یسیلگنا.ئړک نیرمت يسیلګنا هلپخПрактикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help / Ayuda gratuita con los impuestos
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: South Park Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.Spanish support may be provided per request.----------------------------------------------------------------Voluntarios capacitados estarán disponibles para responder preguntas y preparar declaraciones de impuestos personales.Se puede proporcionar ayuda en español a pedido.

Event details
